title: FEMUR Application Record
description: Schema for a single application record in the applications JSONL output. Each line in applications.jsonl conforms to this schema.

cid.description: CrowdStrike Customer ID (CID) that owns this host.

name.description: Application name as reported by the Falcon sensor.

vendor.description: Application vendor as reported by the Falcon sensor.

name_vendor.description: Combined name and vendor identifier used for deduplication.

name_vendor_version.description: Combined name, vendor, and version identifier.

groups.description: Host group IDs this application's host belongs to.

first_seen_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the application was first observed.

last_updated_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent update to this record.

is_suspicious.description: Whether the application has been flagged as suspicious.

is_normalized.description: Whether vendor/product names have been normalized by the API.

host.description: Host reference containing the Discover host ID.

aid.description: Falcon Agent ID. Present when --decorate-aids or --bucket-by-aid is used.

cpe.description: Generated CPE 2.3 URI for this application. Always present in pipeline output.

cpe_match_type.description: How the CPE was derived. Currently always 'generated' (deterministic from record fields).
